style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="320" y="360" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-21" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-3" target="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-3" value="Limit Order Module" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="600" y="360" width="160" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-6" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-5" target="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-5" value="Trader<div><br></div>" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="105" y="500" width="30" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-11" value="Makes a swap in pool" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="470" width="60" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-15" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-1" target="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="240" y="405" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-17" value="Calls plugin's afterSwapHook" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="210" y="370" width="100" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-18" value="Passes data about crossed ticks" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="490" y="360" width="100" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GM4EWbE9CV34l0KPQfOH-23" value="If any of the limit order positions are crossed, the limit order module will call the Burn of that position" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="280" y="290" width="240" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
